case_title: BOB DANG-COMPUTER SYSTEMS, INC. VS CHAN, CRAIG et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,534.68 FILED BY BOB DANG-COMPUTER SYSTEMS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CRAIG PODESTA BALDOCCHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERT MAIL TO CRAIG CHAN/PODESTA BALDOCCHI, RETURNED RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAN, CRAIG PODESTA BALDOCCHI NO APPEARANCE OF EITHER PARTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH SETTLEMENT, NO APPEARANCES NECESSARY ON 12/26/00 AT 10AM, COURT WILL DISMISS ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-14-2000, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-26-2000 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
